mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_coupon WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND coupon_id = #{couponId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_coupon (grab_id, user_id, coupon_id, get_time) VALUES (#{grabId}, #{userId}, #{couponId}, #{getTime})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_coupon WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND coupon_id = #{couponId}
